channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo’s ‘Drop Dead’ Debuts at No. 1 on U.K. Charts
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: Welcome back to the show. We've got the latest updates from the world of music, and it's all about the UK charts. Let's dive in.
[Music transitions]
Host: Olivia Rodrigo is taking over the UK singles chart, with her new song "Drop Dead" debuting at number one. This is her fourth UK number one single, following in the footsteps of "drivers license", "good 4 u", and "vampire". And what's even more exciting is that "Drop Dead" is the first track from her upcoming third album, "You Seem Pretty Sad for a Girl So in Love", which drops on June 12.
[Music clip: "Drop Dead" by Olivia Rodrigo]
Host: Meanwhile, Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's "Rein Me In" has been dethroned after five weeks at the top spot. But don't worry, Olivia Dean is celebrating the start of her global tour, "The Art of Loving", which kicked off in Glasgow, Scotland.
[Music transitions]
Host: And it looks like Coachella has given Justin Bieber a major boost. His 2012 song "Beauty and a Beat" is up to number three, and his 2025 song "Daises" has jumped 10 places to number five. We're also seeing appearances from "Baby" and his collaboration with Sean Kingston, "Eenie Meenie", inside the top 40.
[Music clip: "Beauty and a Beat" by Justin Bieber]
Host: On the albums chart, Skindred has pipped Jessie Ware to the number one spot with their ninth studio album, "You Got This". It's their first album to reach the top spot, and what an achievement. Jessie Ware's "Superbloom" comes in at number two, and Zayn's "Konnakol" closes at number four.
[Outro music plays]
Host: That's all for today. Thanks for tuning in to the latest music updates. We'll catch you on the next episode. [Outro music continues to play]
